title: Async/await， read file error: greenlet.error: cannot switch to a different thread

comments.body: I ran into this exact same greenlet threading error on Linux with async file uploads. Found this guide really helpful: https://flaskasyncpatterns.dev/gevent-greenlet-threading-issues/ It explains the context switching issue between threads and gevent.

body:
When i try to read file on windows 10, it is work,
but i try to read file on linux, it is error:

Traceback (most recent call last):
